target.name: scan-ai-conversations
target.description: Read-only scan of AI agent conversations in Datastore

target.name: backfill-ai-conversations
target.description: Create ConversationData rows using a logs-derived mapping CSV

target.name: help
target.echo:
AI Agent Migration Tools ======================== Usage: ant <tool> -Dproject=gcp-project [-Dextra.args='...']
Tools: scan-ai-conversations Read-only scan: groups ConversationMessageData by conversationId, cross-references with ConversationData, reports per-conversation stats and bucketises. args: [--csv=out.csv] [--limit=N]
backfill-ai-conversations Backfill ConversationData rows using a CSV exported from Cloud Logging. CSV must have columns conversation_id,message where message contains 'userId=N, projectId=N'. Dry-run by default. args: --mapping=path.csv [--commit]
Examples: ant scan-ai-conversations -Dproject=my-gcp-project ant scan-ai-conversations -Dproject=my-gcp-project -Dextra.args="--csv=scan.csv" ant backfill-ai-conversations -Dproject=my-gcp-project \ -Dextra.args="--mapping=logs.csv" # dry-run ant backfill-ai-conversations -Dproject=my-gcp-project \ -Dextra.args="--mapping=logs.csv --commit" # write
